channel.title: Errors on WordPress FAQ
channel.description: Recent content in Errors on WordPress FAQ

item.title: How to Fix a Hacked WordPress Site
item.description: The community consensus is that most hacks stem from outdated plugins or poor hosting security, requiring a clean reinstall to fully recover. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 8. Known Issues Backdoor files hiding in hosting accounts Malicious code in plugins Insecure PHP versions on shared hosting Database injection Community Q&A How do I clean a hacked WordPress site? Start with a fresh WordPress installation, import your database SQL file, and manually migrate only your /wp-content/uploads folder.
